# NOTE: all tokens here are SYNTHETIC. Do not check in real credentials.

JWT example:
Authorization: Bearer eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9.eyJzdWIiOiIxMjM0NTY3ODkwIn0.dozjgNryP4J3jVmNHl0w5N_XgL0n3I9PlFUP0THsR8U

AWS access key:
export AWS_ACCESS_KEY_ID=AKIAIOSFODNN7EXAMPLE

GitHub PAT:
export GITHUB_TOKEN=ghp_aBcDeFgHiJkLmNoPqRsTuVwXyZ0123456789AB

GitLab PAT:
export GITLAB_TOKEN=glpat-aBcDeFgHiJkLmNoPqRsT

Stripe key (test):
STRIPE_SECRET=sk_test_aBcDeFgHiJkLmNoPqRsTuVwX

OpenAI:
OPENAI_API_KEY=sk-aBcDeFgHiJkLmNoPqRsTuVwXyZ

Anthropic:
ANTHROPIC_API_KEY=sk-ant-api03-aBcDeFgHiJkLmNoPqRsTuVwX

Slack:
SLACK_TOKEN=xoxb-1234567890-abcdefghij

Plain (non-JWT) Bearer in header:
Authorization: Bearer aBcDeFgHi9876543210xyz

Generic-looking high-entropy token:
SERVICE_AUTH=aBc123XyZ987KkPpQqRrSsTtUuVvWw
